title: Minecraft Bedrock Loot Table
description: Defines loot that can be generated from entities, chests, fishing, and other gameplay events.

pools.description: A list of loot pools. Each pool is rolled independently to select entries.

loot_pool.title: Loot Pool
loot_pool.description: Defines a pool of loot entries that can be rolled one or more times.

bonus_rolls.description: Additional rolls added based on luck attribute.

conditions.description: Array of conditions that must be met for this pool to be rolled.

entries.description: Array of possible entries to select from when rolling this pool.

rolls.description: Number of times to roll this pool.

rolls_range.title: Rolls Range
rolls_range.description: A range of roll counts with minimum and maximum values.

loot_entry.title: Loot Table Entry
loot_entry.description: Defines an entry in a loot table pool that can be selected when the pool rolls.

conditions.description: Array of conditions that must be met for this entry to be considered.

functions.description: Array of functions to apply to the item when selected.

weight.description: The relative weight of this entry being selected. Higher weights are more likely.

quality.description: Additional weight added to this entry based on the luck attribute. Can be negative.

pools.description: Nested pools for type 'loot_table'. Allows inline loot table definition.

conditions.description: Array of conditions that must be met for this entry to be considered.

weight.description: The relative weight of this entry being selected. Higher weights are more likely.

quality.description: Additional weight added to this entry based on the luck attribute. Can be negative.

pools.description: Nested pools for type 'loot_table'. Allows inline loot table definition. Requires valid 'name'.

conditions.description: Array of conditions that must be met for this entry to be considered.

weight.description: The relative weight of this entry being selected. Higher weights are more likely.

quality.description: Additional weight added to this entry based on the luck attribute. Can be negative.

tiers.title: Tiers
tiers.description: Tiered entry selection configuration for a loot pool.

name_item.description: The item identifier for an item entry.

name_loot_table.description: The loot table path for a loot table entry.
